items.title: S01E01 - The Facts of Life
items.summary: Struggling actor Charles Danby meets children's' author Clara Burrell at a boring party and asks her out for an afternoon and teaches her about ""who does which, when and whatever.""

infolabels.title: The Facts of Life
infolabels.plot: Struggling actor Charles Danby meets children's' author Clara Burrell at a boring party and asks her out for an afternoon and teaches her about ""who does which, when and whatever.""

items.title: S01E02 - The Object of the Game
items.summary: After a week and a half of going out, Clara tries to fit into C.D.'s life by joining his football team as a goalkeeper. This doesn't bother C.D. so much as what she does during and after the match.

infolabels.title: The Object of the Game
infolabels.plot: After a week and a half of going out, Clara tries to fit into C.D.'s life by joining his football team as a goalkeeper. This doesn't bother C.D. so much as what she does during and after the match.

items.title: S01E03 - More Royle Than Noble Really
items.summary: C.D. suffers from a case of nerves when he comes to meet Clara's father and the imperious butler Royle; but who is who and what about the boiler?

infolabels.title: More Royle Than Noble Really
infolabels.plot: C.D. suffers from a case of nerves when he comes to meet Clara's father and the imperious butler Royle; but who is who and what about the boiler?

items.title: S01E04 - Finding the Form
items.summary: C.D. takes Clara clothes shopping to try to change her image.

infolabels.title: Finding the Form
infolabels.plot: C.D. takes Clara clothes shopping to try to change her image.

items.title: S01E05 - Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
items.summary: C.D. tries to hide that fact that he was an orphan by hiring actor friends to play his parents at a dinner party given by Clara's parents. Confusion arises when Royle takes the week off and the temporary staff arrives before C.D.'s ""parents.""

infolabels.title: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
infolabels.plot: C.D. tries to hide that fact that he was an orphan by hiring actor friends to play his parents at a dinner party given by Clara's parents. Confusion arises when Royle takes the week off and the temporary staff arrives before C.D.'s ""parents.""

items.title: S01E06 - Just Cause or Impediment
items.summary: Clara decides they should try various aspects of living together before they get married. Clara tries her hand at cooking except she ""forgot to light the oven.""

infolabels.title: Just Cause or Impediment
infolabels.plot: Clara decides they should try various aspects of living together before they get married. Clara tries her hand at cooking except she ""forgot to light the oven.""

items.title: S01E07 - Now We Are Married
items.summary: The Danbys try not to let anyone know that they are on their ""thingy."" So when they arrive at the hotel they try to convince everyone there that they have been married for years.

infolabels.title: Now We Are Married
infolabels.plot: The Danbys try not to let anyone know that they are on their ""thingy."" So when they arrive at the hotel they try to convince everyone there that they have been married for years.

items.title: S01E08 - Everything in the Garden
items.summary: The newlyweds have their first ""sage and sorrel"" over household chores and Clara's painting everything white. In her painting, she includes the garden; ""except for the earth, I left the earth brown, for contrast like you said.""

infolabels.title: Everything in the Garden
infolabels.plot: The newlyweds have their first ""sage and sorrel"" over household chores and Clara's painting everything white. In her painting, she includes the garden; ""except for the earth, I left the earth brown, for contrast like you said.""

items.title: S01E09 - Having Them Back
items.summary: Clara and C.D. have a disastrous dinner party to pay back their social obligations.

infolabels.title: Having Them Back
infolabels.plot: Clara and C.D. have a disastrous dinner party to pay back their social obligations.

items.title: S01E10 - Plenty of Shoulder Not Much Wheel
items.summary: Clara quarrels with her publisher over the use of Ollie the Otter for a new project and C.D. goes quietly crazy when he's been out of work for nine weeks straight.

infolabels.title: Plenty of Shoulder Not Much Wheel
infolabels.plot: Clara quarrels with her publisher over the use of Ollie the Otter for a new project and C.D. goes quietly crazy when he's been out of work for nine weeks straight.

items.title: S01E11 - Bed, Beautiful Bed
items.summary: Still unemployed, the Danbys sell Clara's antique bed to help pay the bills because they aren't broke but ""more completely knackered really."" Then they learn the aunt who gave it to her is back in England and wants it back to give it to a recently married relative; meanwhile Clara tries to train Harold.

infolabels.title: Bed, Beautiful Bed
infolabels.plot: Still unemployed, the Danbys sell Clara's antique bed to help pay the bills because they aren't broke but ""more completely knackered really."" Then they learn the aunt who gave it to her is back in England and wants it back to give it to a recently married relative; meanwhile Clara tries to train Harold.

items.title: S01E12 - Only Make Believe
items.summary: Clara gets a small part in a movie featuring C.D. and their living room.

infolabels.title: Only Make Believe
infolabels.plot: Clara gets a small part in a movie featuring C.D. and their living room.

items.title: S01E13 - Surprise Surprise
items.summary: C.D. & Clara try to surprise each other on the morning of their first wedding anniversary and are both surprised by a burglar.

infolabels.title: Surprise Surprise
infolabels.plot: C.D. & Clara try to surprise each other on the morning of their first wedding anniversary and are both surprised by a burglar.
